text:
The Radio Rat (リモコンラット, Rimokon Ratto—lit. "Remote Control Rat") is a Greed Island monster that lives in the G.I. Badlands and also can be found all over the island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 136 

Overview

It is a timid rodent that manipulates objects using Nen to scare away predators while hiding, it faints when it is seen. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

When Gon and Killua are in the hills fighting monsters when they encounter what seems to be a knight in armor. Biscuit, who happens to be following them, tells them to use Gyo. This is the first time that Biscuit helps the two of them, as she is frustrated with the waste of their potential. When they follow her instruction, they find out that the armor is just an object manipulated by the rat. Upon being seen by Killua, it then faints and they gain the card. 

Card

" card (2011 version)]]

This is an H-rank card with an 800-card limit and a designated number of 711. This card can be obtained once the rat is found. 

Abilities & Powers

These rats can control objects from a distance to attack enemies while they stay hidden. If found, they will turn into cards.
